name: StatusIndicator
description: Displays a semantic validation status icon for info, success, warning, or error states.

status.description: Semantic status value used to select the rendered indicator icon

size.description: Icon size inherited from icon sizing props

aria-label.description: Accessible name; defaults to the `status` value

aria-hidden.description: Hide from assistive technology when used decoratively beside equivalent text

aria: aria-label — required for meaningful standalone usage; defaults to the status value
When decorative and duplicated by nearby text, set aria-hidden="true"
